query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN errorMessage LIKE 'CLOB order: 0x%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_0x_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN errorMessage LIKE 'CLOB order: unknown' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_unknown,
  SUM(CASE WHEN orderId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_order_id
FROM orders WHERE status = 'placed';
